reasoning: L(OL)+ requires L followed by one or more OL. Shortest is LOL.
(HO)+ requires one or more HO. Shortest is HO.
K(EK)*E allows for K followed by zero or more EK ending in E. Shortest is KE.
(HAR+)+ requires HAR repeated with R at least once. Shortest is HAR.
H(EH)+ is H followed by one or more EH. Shortest is HEH.
ROT?FL is 'RO' optionally with T, ending in FL. Shortest is ROFL.
TE(HE+)+ is TE followed by HE once or more. Shortest is TEHE.
LAW*L is L followed by zero or more As, ending in L. Shortest is LL.
MWA(HA)+ is MWA followed by one or more HAs. Shortest is MWAHA.
HE(HE)+ is HE followed by HE at least once. Shortest is HEHE.
LO+L is L, one or more O, then L. Shortest is LOL.
HAHA* is HA, followed by zero or more As. Shortest is HA.
(AH)+A+ is one or more AH followed by one or more A. Shortest is AHA.
HA+ is one or more HA. Shortest is HA.
(JA)+ requires JA repeated one or more times. Shortest is JA.
